page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepDigest is a deep learning-based tool to predict the proteotypic cleavage sites for eight commonly used proteases (trypsin, ArgC, chymotrypsin, GluC, LysC, AspN, LysN, and LysargiNase).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepDigest is a deep learning-based tool to predict the proteotypic cleavage sites for eight commonly used proteases (trypsin, ArgC, chymotrypsin, GluC, LysC, AspN, LysN, and LysargiNase).
